Talk With Us
Why cleaning companies choose us

Built on trust, simplicity, and performance.

Your business deserves a growth partner that removes friction instead of adding it. Our offer is straightforward, easy to understand, and designed to keep risk low while helping you win more work.

🤝

Trust-first model

No confusing contracts, hidden fees, or expensive retainers. We keep the model transparent so you always know how it works and when you pay.

⚡

Simple to start

Tell us where you operate, what type of jobs you want, and what your team can handle. We help connect you with customer opportunities that fit.

📈

Performance-based pricing

You only pay a small percentage after the work is completed and the client has paid. That means our incentives stay aligned with your growth.

How it works

A clean, low-friction path to more jobs.

We designed the process to be easy for busy owners and operators. No bloated onboarding. No complicated setup. Just a practical model focused on generating business.

1

Tell us about your business

Share your service area, cleaning specialties, ideal client types, and current capacity so we can understand where you want to grow.

2

We help bring you opportunities

We generate customer demand and connect your company with residential or commercial jobs that match the type of work you want most.

3

You close, complete, and get paid

Once the job is finished and the client pays you, we receive a small percentage. No payment before revenue. No growth without results.

Pricing that reduces risk

Finally, a growth model that makes financial sense.

Traditional marketing often asks cleaning businesses to spend money upfront and hope the results come later. We flip that model and make our pricing contingent on real outcomes.

Performance-based only

No setup fees. No retainers. No monthly commitment.

Pay only after the job is done and paid.

Our compensation comes from a small percentage of completed and paid work, helping you scale with confidence and protect cash flow while you grow.

  • Zero upfront cost to get started
  • No recurring retainers draining your budget
  • Aligned incentives from day one
  • Designed for sustainable, low-risk growth
💵

Protect your cash flow

Keep capital available for labor, supplies, vehicles, and operations instead of paying for marketing before results show up.

🧾

Easy to understand

Owners know exactly what they are agreeing to: a straightforward percentage after revenue is collected from the client.

Who we help

Residential and commercial cleaning businesses ready to grow.

Whether you focus on homes, offices, recurring contracts, or specialty cleanings, our model is built to support companies that want more opportunities without taking on more financial risk.

🏠

Residential cleaning companies

Perfect for teams focused on recurring home cleaning, move-in and move-out cleaning, deep cleaning, post-construction cleaning, or premium household services.

🏢

Commercial cleaning companies

Ideal for businesses serving offices, retail spaces, medical facilities, property managers, short-term rentals, and other recurring commercial accounts.

What makes this different

We only win when you win.

That alignment changes the relationship. Instead of paying for activity, you invest in outcomes. Instead of carrying the full risk, you gain a partner motivated to help you succeed.

🛡️

Risk-free growth positioning

This model is especially valuable for cleaning companies that want consistent lead flow but do not want to gamble on setup costs, ad spend, or monthly retainers that may or may not perform.

🔎

Clear offer

Easy for owners to understand, explain internally, and evaluate quickly.

🚀

Growth-focused

Designed for companies that want more booked work without taking on upfront marketing risk.

🧼

Industry-specific

The messaging speaks directly to cleaning operators, not generic local businesses.

FAQ

Answers to the questions cleaning owners usually ask first.

The model is intentionally simple, but these quick answers help remove uncertainty and make next steps feel easy.

Do I have to pay anything to get started?

No. There are no setup fees, no monthly retainers, and no upfront marketing charges.

When do you get paid?

We are paid only after you successfully complete the cleaning job and receive payment from the client.

What types of cleaning companies do you work with?

We are built for residential and commercial cleaning businesses, including solo operators, growing teams, and established companies expanding into new opportunities.

Why is this lower risk than traditional marketing?

Because you are not paying for promises, setup, or time-based retainers. You pay only after real work is completed and paid for.

Ready to grow with less risk?
